expectations.text: behavioral_check: Identifies `CurationV1` as the mandatory next step (initial curation, not optional) before anything downstream of spike sorting can be reached
expectations.evidence: Explicitly says 'You don't need CurationV1 for the clusterless path' and 'Curation is optional/sidestepped on this track' — opposite of the required claim.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Calls out the merge insert into `SpikeSortingOutput` (e.g. `insert([curation_key], part_name='CurationV1')`) as a separate explicit step that does not happen automatically
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows `SpikeSortingOutput.insert([{...}], part_name='SpikeSortingV1')` as a separate manual insert (note: uses SpikeSortingV1 part rather than CurationV1, but it is named as a distinct step).
